title: Danger Alert
description: Alerts you if theres any danger beneath you!
body:
![logo](https://i.postimg.cc/k42K20Zw/render.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# 📖 Description

Danger alert is a simple Datapack & Mod that alerts you if theres any danger below you, it can be lava, pointed dripstone or even a dangerous gap.

Be careful! This Datapack/Mod won't work if you don't train your muscle memory to stop mining after looking the advice!.

![2](https://i.postimg.cc/Mp0w1XVZ/showcase_2.gif)
![1](https://i.postimg.cc/xTch08tm/showcase-1.gif)![3](https://i.postimg.cc/2SCkc4z3/showcase-3.gif)
